mapper.select: SELECT role_code ,role_name ,explanation ,admin_ck FROM role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode}
SELECT ra_code ,category ,rd_rol ,wr_rol ,mo_rol ,del_rol FROM role_authority WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} ORDER BY ra_code
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(role_code), 0) + 1 FROM role
INSERT INTO role (role_code, role_name, explanation, admin_ck) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{explanation}, #{adminCk})

SELECT NVL(MAX(ra_code), 0) + 1 FROM role_authority
INSERT INTO role_authority (ra_code, role_code, category, rd_rol, wr_rol, mo_rol, del_rol) VALUES (#{raCode},#{roleCode}, #{category}, #{rdRol}, #{wrRol}, #{moRol}, #{delRol})
mapper.update: UPDATE role SET role_name = role_name || '-delete' WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND role_name NOT LIKE '%-delete'
